title: MenuItem
description: A single item on the Kahani menu.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Never changes once published.

categories.description: One or more category ids from categories.json.

context.description: e.g. standard, starter, grill-main, main, side, per-person, for-two.

priceOnRequest.description: True when the price cannot be listed and must be requested (e.g. included items, unlisted price).

dietary.description: Positive dietary claims only. Absence does not imply unsuitability — confirm with restaurant.

allergens.description: Allergen ids present in this dish. References allergens.json.

sortOrder.description: Position within the category. Lower numbers appear first.

imageRef.description: Path or asset reference for the item image.

imageAlt.description: Accessible alt text for the item image.

featured.description: True for items highlighted on the home page or top of section.

seasonal.description: True when the item is only available at certain times of year.

soldOut.description: True when the item is temporarily unavailable.

serves.description: Number of people the portion serves, for sharing dishes.

modifiers.description: Modifier ids from modifiers.json that apply to this item.

size.description: Portion or container size label, e.g. 330ml, Small, Large.
